# Team Flow — implementer rules
_Loaded by `flow-implementer` after Serena activation. Edit freely below the imported block._

# imported from CLAUDE.md (auto-regenerated by /teams:init)
- [must-fix] Honor coding conventions from AGENTS.md §Coding Style & Naming Conventions, §Project Structure & Module Organization, §Agent-Specific Instructions; CLAUDE.md §Codebase Navigation.
- [must-fix] Forbidden zones: `dist/`, `public/`, `index.html`, `vite.config.ts`, `tsconfig*.json`, `.github/workflows/` — do not edit files in these paths. Propose changes to build/CI/static-shell via `SendMessage` to `team-lead` instead.
# end imported

## Implementation-phase rules
- [must-fix] Every type-system escape hatch (`any`, `unknown` where a narrower type fits, `as any`, `// @ts-ignore`, `// @ts-expect-error` without an issue link, non-null assertion `!`) requires a one-line written reason in `phase-N-result.md`. No reason = the reviewer will reject. (Project context: `tsconfig.app.json` has `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` and `verbatimModuleSyntax: true` — handle indexed-access `T | undefined` properly, and use `import type { ... }` for type-only imports rather than reaching for casts.)
- [must-fix] No `TODO`/`FIXME`/`XXX` comments in shipped code unless the plan names them explicitly.
- [must-fix] If the plan needs a new dependency, stop and ask via `SendMessage` to `team-lead` — never add silently. The codebase deliberately omits Zod, react-dnd, dnd-kit, CSS-in-JS, and Tailwind; introducing any of these requires explicit approval.
- [must-fix] Run all four exit-gate commands from `project.md` verbatim before reporting done; never silence rules to pass. Note: `test_command` is `none` — do **not** invent or run a test command. The two real gates are `npm run build` (which folds in `tsc -b` strict type-check) and `npm run lint`.
- [must-fix] Honor forbidden zones from `_shared.md` and the imported block above.
- [should-fix] Re-use existing utilities; if you introduce duplication, flag it in `phase-N-result.md`. Look for existing helpers in `src/application/boardUseCases.ts`, `src/domain/board.ts` factories, and `src/features/board/components/{priorityMeta,taskColorMeta}.ts` before creating new ones.
- [should-fix] Prefer Serena's symbolic editing tools (`replace_symbol_body`, `insert_after_symbol`, `rename_symbol`) for whole-symbol changes — CLAUDE.md mandates Serena for navigation, and the symbolic editors keep diffs scoped.

## Implementer-specific tactics
The senior-specialist baseline in `_shared.md` is in force. The items below are implementer-specific reinforcements; they do not duplicate the baseline.

- [must-fix] When the analyzer (`tsc -b`) or lint (`eslint .`) fails, fix the **code**, not the test, not the config, not the rule. If the root cause is non-obvious, document it in `phase-N-result.md` so the reviewer can verify the fix matches the cause. Disabling an ESLint rule via `// eslint-disable-next-line` requires the same one-line reason as a type escape hatch.
- [must-fix] Out-of-scope discoveries go in `phase-N-result.md` under "Out-of-scope follow-ups", never into the diff. The shared baseline forbids "while I was here" changes; this rule names the place to record them.
- [must-fix] Do not catch-and-re-throw exceptions you cannot meaningfully handle — let them propagate. Empty `catch` blocks, `_ = err` swallowing, and "log and ignore" patterns are violations of the no-half-finished-implementations baseline. Project exception: the persistence serializers' graceful-degradation pattern is *intentional* (drop invalid tasks, default priority) — match that style only inside `src/infrastructure/persistence/`, not elsewhere.
- [must-fix] Match the established immutability/pure-function style: use-cases in `src/application/boardUseCases.ts` return new `Board` values via spread (`{ ...board, tasks: { ...board.tasks, [id]: newTask } }`); reducers use Immer (inside `createSlice`). Do not introduce ad-hoc mutation helpers or class-based state holders.
- [must-fix] When adding to the persisted shape, update both the type in `src/domain/board.ts` **and** the parser in `src/infrastructure/persistence/{board,workspace}Serializer.ts` in the same diff — and decide explicitly whether a `schemaVersion` bump + migration is needed. Half-updated persistence is a regression that survives a clean lint+build.
- [should-fix] Smallest readable change: prefer editing the existing function over copy-and-modify. Prefer an inline fix over a new helper unless the helper has a second caller in the same diff.
- [should-fix] All new component styles go in `src/styles/main.scss` (single global stylesheet). Do not introduce CSS modules, styled-components, or colocated `.module.scss` files.
